name: macOS Say TTS
description: Expose an OpenAI-compatible /v1/audio/speech endpoint backed by macOS say.

defaultVoice.label: Default Voice
defaultVoice.help: macOS say voice name, for example Tingting.

defaultRate.label: Default Rate
defaultRate.help: Speech rate in words per minute when the request omits speed.

sampleRate.label: WAV Sample Rate
sampleRate.help: Output sample rate passed to afconvert when response_format is wav.

maxInputChars.label: Max Input Chars
maxInputChars.help: Reject requests whose input text exceeds this length.

commandMediaBaseUrl.label: Command Media Base URL
commandMediaBaseUrl.help: Base URL used to build temporary media links for /tts command replies.

mediaTtlSeconds.label: Media TTL Seconds
mediaTtlSeconds.help: How long temporary command-generated audio files remain downloadable.
